formatDescription: GGUF is a binary file format for storing large language model weights, metadata, and tokeniser data in a single self-contained file, designed for efficient loading and inference on consumer hardware. It was introduced in August 2023 by the llama.cpp project as a successor to earlier formats.

internalSignatures.name: GGUF 3
internalSignatures.note: BOF, offset 0: 'GGUF', followed by 4 byte version indicator 0x03000000
